verses.text: Judah gam kumpi ahi Uzziah, Jotham, Ahaz, leh Hezekiah-te' hun lai-in Amoz' tapa Isaiah in Judah gam leh Jerusalem khua tawh kisai a maangmuhnate
Vantungte aw, na za un; leitung aw, na ngai in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in thu hong gen khinzo a, “Ka pattahsa ka tate in kei hong lehdo uh hi
Bawng in amah a neipa thei a, la in zong a topa' an piakna mun thei buang hi. Ahih hangin Israel in bangmah theilo a, keima mite in thei theilo uh hi,” a ci hi

Ah, a khial minam, mawhna in a nencip mite, siatna a bawlte' suanlekhakte, a gamtatsia tapate! Amaute in Topa nusia khin uh a, amaute in Israel-te' Siangtho Pasian simmawh khin uh hi. Amaute in lam khial khin taktak uh hi
Bang hangin note hong kisat theihna dingin lehdo teitei na hi uh hiam? Israel aw, na lutang khempeuh liamma dim a, na lungsim leh na ngaihsutna gim mahmah hi
Khenuai-a kipan luzang dong nangawnin a cidamna mun omlo a, sanim gawpnate, meimapite, leh siluang liammate a om hi. Tuate pen a nai kisallo, kitunlo, sathau tawh zong kinomsak lo hi
Na gam uh khing a, na khuapite uh mei tawh kihal hi. Na muh tangpi mahun gamdang mite in na gam uh hong laksakin na khempeuh susia gawp hi
Jerusalem khuapi bek omlai a, leenggui lo-a buk, tangmai lo sunga om hampheng bangin kuama donlohin kinusia a, a ki-umcip khuapi bangin kinusia hi
Vanglian Topa in eite tawmno khat a nungta-in hong sit hi kei leh, eite pen Sodom khua bang khinin Gomorrah khua i bang khinta ding hi.
Sodom a uk mangte aw, Topa' thu na za un! No Gomorrah mite aw, i Pasian' hihna na ngai un

Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Note' biakpiakna a tampite pen kei' tungah bang hi leltak ahi hiam? Tuutalte leh ganhing thaute' sathau tawh meihal biaknate ka kham ta hi. Bawngtalte, tuunote, leh keelte' si tawh kei ka lungkim kei hi
Kei' mai-ah a kilaak dingin na hong pai uh ciangin hih bangin ka huangsung na tuatcil gawpna uh kua'n hong deih ding ahi hiam
Bangmahin a kimanglo piaknate hong paipih nawn kei un. Paknamtui halna ka kih hi. Khadet ni, Sabbath ni, leh thupi takin na kikhopnate uh mawhna tawh kidim ahih manin ke'n ka thuakzo kei hi
Note' Khadet nite leh na pawite uh ka mudah hi. Tuate pen kei-a' dingin vangikpi khat suakkhin a, tuate khempeuh ka puakna-in ka gim hi
“Thungenin na khutte uh nong zaak uh ciangin note kong en kei ding a, thu tampi na nget uh hangin ke'n ka ngai tuan kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh sisan tawh note' khut kidim hi
Note kisil tawm un la, a siangtho-in kibawl un. Keima muhna-ah na gamtat siatnate uh paikhia-in, siatna na bawlte uh khawl un
Gamtat hoih ding kisin un. Thumanin gamta un la, kinetniamna kheel un. Pa neilote hu un la, meigong numei pan'pih un,” ci hi

Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Tu-in hong pai un la, thu kikumkhawm ni. Na mawhnate uh puansan a bat hangin vuk bangin hong ngo ding hi. Na mawhnate uh si bangin a san hangin tuumul bangin hong kang ding hi
Note in utna lungsim nei-in thu na man' nak uh leh lei pana piang a gah hoihte na ne ding uh hi
Ahih hangin note in kei hong nialin na hong lehdo uh leh namsau in note hong vatmai ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih thu gen khinzo hi,” a ci hi.
A thutak, thutang tawh a kidim ngeisa khuapi, bangci-a a paktat numei tawh kibang ta ahi hiam? Ama sungah thumanna om ngei napi-in tu-in mi thatte bek a om ta hi
Jerusalem khuapi aw, nguntang na bang ngei a, tu-in ahih leh ngunek na suakta hi. Leenggahzu limci na bang ngei a, tu-in ahih leh tui mawkmawk na bangta hi
Na uliante, mi lehdote hi a, gutate tawh a kikhawlte ahi hi. Mi khempeuh in sumgolh leh letsong a deih uh hi. Amaute in pa neilote pan'pihlo uh a, meigongnu' thu amaute in sanglo uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin, Topa, Vanglian Topa, Israel-te' Vanglian Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: “Ah, ka lang ahi note' tungah ka hehna kong khahkhia ding a, ka gal ahi note tungah keimah in kong thuk ding hi
Note tungah na kong sem ding a, meikhukah haltui bangin na saamek teng uh tuikhia sakin, na kihelpih na nin khempeuh uh ka lakhia ding hi
A masa-a bangin na thukhente, a kipat cila bangin na upate ka koihkik ding hi. Tua khit ciangin nang pen thuman khuapi, thutak khuapi, hong kici ding hi,” a ci hi
Topa thutang ahih manin Jerusalem khuapi honkhia ding a, a sungah a teng a kisik mi khempeuh zong a honkhia ding hi
Ahih hangin a lehdo mite leh a khial mite kisusia khawmin Topa a nusiate pen kibeimangsak ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh tawsaw kungte na biakna hangun note na maizum ding uh a, biakna huan na bawlna hangun zahhuai-in na mai uh san ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh note pen a teh a vul tawsaw kung leh tui a ngahlo huan tawh na kibang ding uh hi
A thahat mipa pen patlom tawh kibang ding a, ama nasepna pen meiek suak ding hi. Kuamah in phelhzo loin amaute gel kangtum khawm ding uh hi.
